Retrieves the processed data stored in the global application state.

Retrieves the processed data stored in the global application state.

Retrieves the processed data stored in the global application state.
getATRs() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the ATR values across the indicator collection.
getClosures() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the closing market quotes of the loaded data records.
getCMFs() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the CMF values across the indicator collection.
getDataRecordsInstants() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the timestamps of the loaded data records.
getFeatureNames() - Method in class app.gui.views.BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel
Returns the list of dimension names examined by the subclass, used to label the contribution charts.

Returns the list of dimension names examined by the subclass, used to label the contribution charts.
getFeatureNames() - Method in class app.gui.views.FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel
Returns the list of dimension names examined by the subclass, used to label the contribution charts.
getFinancialIndicatorsInstants() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the timestamps of the calculated financial indicators.
getHighs() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the peak high market boundaries of the loaded data records.

Returns the unique instance of ApiClient.
getInstance() - Static method in class app.controller.Controller
Returns the unique instance of Controller.
getInstance() - Static method in class app.model.AppState
Returns the unique runtime instance of AppState.
getLows() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the baseline low market boundaries of the loaded data records.
getMACDs() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the MACD values across the indicator collection.
getOpens() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the opening pricing quotes of the loaded data records.
getPreferredScrollableViewportSize() - Method in class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Returns the baseline preferred sizing metrics for this viewport container.
getRSIs() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the RSI values across the indicator collection.
getScrollableBlockIncrement(Rectangle, int, int) - Method in class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Defines the larger structural step scroll increment offset when clicking inside track blocks (e.g., Page Up/Down).
getScrollableTracksViewportHeight() - Method in class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Permits the component height to expand dynamically past viewport bounds.
getScrollableTracksViewportWidth() - Method in class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Forces the component width to restrictively match the enclosing viewport width.
getScrollableUnitIncrement(Rectangle, int, int) - Method in class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Defines the small step scroll increment offset when using a fine controller (e.g., arrow keys, wheel ticks).
getTimestamp() - Method in class app.model.DataRecord
Retrieves the precise temporal point tracking when this row snapshot was recorded.
getTimestamp() - Method in class app.model.FinancialIndicators
Retrieves the precise temporal point tracking when this row snapshot was recorded.
getTimestamp() - Method in interface app.model.TimeSeriesRow
Retrieves the precise temporal point tracking when this row snapshot was recorded.
getValue() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
Returns the calculated active average value.
getValue() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Divides cached money flow values against the cumulative aggregate volume pool.
getValue() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator.EmaCalculator
Returns the calculated active exponential value.
getValue() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
Subtracts the baseline slow valuation line from the reactive fast valuation metrics.
getValue() - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator
Compiles the relative strength calculation, bounding the final metric output between 0 and 100.
getVolumes() - Method in class app.model.AppState
Extracts and compiles a list containing only the volume metrics of the loaded data records.
